_comment: Dataverse-style incident & action tracker for the Atlas payments outage. This is the create_entity / update_entity / fetch write target for the 'Agent with MCP / Tools' tier (the create/update-action-item hero action). '_tracker' suffix => citation kind 'action'; rows carry an 'action' field for nice citation titles. Fields: action, service, owner, status, due (due time).

action_tracker.action: Execute rollback of Atlas payments v4.7 to v4.6
Monitor Atlas payments error rate for two hours before all-clear
Confirm and publish customer-communications commitment to affected merchants
